projects.short_uz: Sotuv, HR va moliyani bitta operatsion markazda birlashtiruvchi to'liq ERP platforma.
projects.description_uz: Robbit — har bir bo'lim uchun, ya'ni omborni nazorat qilishdan moliyaviy hisobotgacha bo'lgan ishlarda operatorlarga bitta izchil interfeys beradigan korxona resurslarini boshqarish tizimi. Men butun mahsulot dizaynini olib bordim: axborot arxitekturasi, boshqaruv panellari, ma'lumotga boy jadvallar, formalar va hisobot qatlamlari. Asosiy e'tibor operatsion aniqlik, murakkab ma'lumotlarni tez o'qish va o'nlab ish jarayonlarini vizual izchillikni saqlab qo'llab-quvvatlaydigan kengayuvchan dizayn tizimiga qaratildi.
projects.short_en: End-to-end ERP platform that unifies inventory, sales, HR, and finance into one operational hub.
projects.description_en: Robbit is an enterprise resource planning system designed to give operators a single, consistent interface across every department — from warehouse tracking to financial reporting. I led the full product design: information architecture, dashboards, data-dense tables, forms, and the reporting layer. The focus was on operational clarity, fast scanning of complex data, and a scalable design system that handles dozens of distinct workflows without losing visual coherence.
